title: Verify post-cancellation feedback pop-up appears
description: Test that after a trial is successfully cancelled, a feedback pop-up is shown to the user.
preconditions: User has just completed the cancellation flow

steps.description: 1. Cancel the trial through any of the available paths.

expected_result: A pop-up for collecting feedback on the cancellation reason is displayed. The 'feedback-popup-viewed' event is fired.
